zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid von Laufen於大約1050年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 勞分勞分時，她的父親Heinrich von Laufen29歲，母親Ida von Werl22歲。她於1080年與Adolf II. von Berg-Hövel結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1121年在德國薩辛哈爾登斯萊本索莫爾陳波格享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid von Laufen于大约1050年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 勞分勞分时，她的父亲Heinrich von Laufen29岁，母亲Ida von Werl22岁。她于1080年与Adolf II. von Berg-Hövel结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1121年在德国薩辛哈爾登斯萊本索莫爾陳波格享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Laufen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Berish, Mayer, Chaim, Leibish, Ari, Hyman, Moishe, Moshe, Myer, Pinchas.  German Hans, Armin, Berthold, Erwin, Frieda, Fritz, Fritzi, Ilse, Mathias, Otto, Siegmund, Wolfgang.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (also Läufer): occupational name for a messenger or a nickname for a fast runner, from an agent derivative of Middle High German loufen, German laufen ‘to run’.
German (also Läufer): habitational name for someone from a place called Lauf, Laufen, or Lauffen in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland (see Lauf ).

variants.name: Lauf
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erna, Heinz, Kurt.
German: habitational name from any of several places called Lauf, Laufen, or Lauffen in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland, all names from the Middle High German word loufe ‘rapids’.
Jewish (from Austrian Galicia): from the German noun Lauf ‘run’, one of surnames randomly assigned by Austrian clerks.

variants.name: Leifer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Elihu, Mayer, Meyer, Avrum, Beril, Hersh, Hyman, Lasar, Moshe, Rivka, Rochel.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Laufer   2.
German: habitational name from a place called Leiferde, of which there are two examples in Lower Saxony.

variants.name: Laufman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ofer, Yael.
Americanized form of German Laufmann, and a variant of the same Jewish (Ashkenazic) surname: variant of Laufer .

variants.name: Leiferman
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): occupational name from Yiddishleyfer ‘messenger’ (see Laufer ).

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Laufen was born about 1050, in Laufen, Laufen, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Heinrich von Laufen, was 29 and her mother, Ida von Werl, was 22. She married Adolf II. von Berg-Hövel in 1080. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1121, in Sommerschenburg, Neuhaldensleben, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid von Laufen est née environ 1050, à Laufen, Landkreis Laufen, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich von Laufen, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ida von Werl, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Adolf II. von Berg-Hövel en 1080. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1121, à Sommerschenburg, Neuhaldensleben, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.Berg, Herscheid, Altena, Westfalen, Preu: Berg, Herscheid, Altena, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen
de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Laufen um 1050 in Laufen, Landkreis Laufen, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich von Laufen 29 und ihre Mutter Ida von Werl 22. Sie hat 1080 Adolf II. von Berg-Hövel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1121 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Sommerschenburg, Neuhaldensleben, Sachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Laufen è nata il circa 1050 nel Laufen, Landkreis Laufen, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Heinrich von Laufen, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Ida von Werl, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Adolf II. von Berg-Hövel nel 1080. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1121, nel Sommerschenburg, Neuhaldensleben, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Laufenが約1050年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ラウフンラウフンで生まれた時，父Heinrich von Laufenは29歳，母Ida von Werlは22歳であった。1080年にAdolf II. von Berg-Hövelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1121年にドイツサチセンネウハルデンスレベンソンメルシェンブルグで72歳で死去した。

ko.Berg, Herscheid, Altena, Westfalen, Preu: 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 알텐아 허슈이드 버그
ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Laufen(이)가 대략 1050년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 로펜 로펜에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich von Laufen(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida von Werl(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1080년 Adolf II. von Berg-Hövel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1121년 독일 작센 니우할덴슬레벤 솜머슈버그에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Laufen nasceu aproximadamente 1050, em Laufen, Landkreis Laufen, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich von Laufen, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Ida von Werl, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Adolf II. von Berg-Hövel em 1080. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1121, em Sommerschenburg, Neuhaldensleben, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 72 anos.

ru.Berg, Herscheid, Altena, Westfalen, Preu: бирг, хирщид, алтена, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid von Laufen родилась около 1050 г. в местности лауфен, ландкрис лауфен, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Heinrich von Laufen было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida von Werl, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adolf II. von Berg-Hövel в 1080 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1121 г. в местности соммирщэнбург, неухэлденслебен, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid von Laufen nació aproximadamente 1050, en Laufen, Landkreis Laufen, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich von Laufen, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Ida von Werl, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Adolf II. von Berg-Hövel en 1080. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1121, en Sommerschenburg, Neuhaldensleben, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 72 años.
